Command.Name: changelog
Command.Description: Add a changelog entry for a specific mod version

Argument.Name: version
Argument.Description: The version of the mod to update the changelog for.

Option.Description: The NexusMods API key. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_APIKEY
The changelog content to add. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_CHANGELOG
The NexusMods game name (domain) to upload the mod to. Can be found in the URL of the game page. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_GAME
The NexusMods mod Id to update the changelog for. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_MODID
Value of the 'nexusmods_session' cookie. Can be a file path or the raw cookie value. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_SESSION_COOKIE

Argument.Name: mod-id
Argument.Description: The NexusMods mod Id to upload the file to.

Argument.Name: archive-file
Argument.Description: Path to the mod archive file to upload.

Option.Description: The NexusMods API key. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_APIKEY
Name for the file on NexusMods. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_FILENAME
The NexusMods game name (domain) to upload the mod to. Can be found in the URL of the game page. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_GAME
Skips updating your mod's main version to match this file's version. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_SKIPMAINVERSIONUPDATE
Removes the Download With Manager button. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_REMOVEDOWNLOADWITHMANAGER
Value of the 'nexusmods_session' cookie. Can be a file path or the raw cookie value. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_SESSION_COOKIE
Sets this file as the main Vortex file (for the Download with Manager buttons). Available Environment Variable: UNEX_SETMAINVORTEXFILE
Version for your uploaded file. May also update your main version. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_FILEVERSION

Command.Name: check
Command.Description: Check the validity on an API Key and/or Session Cookie

Option.Description: The NexusMods API key. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_APIKEY
Value of the 'nexusmods_session' cookie. Can be a file path or the raw cookie value. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_SESSION_COOKIE
Value of the 'nexusmods_session' cookie. Can be a file path or the raw cookie value. Available Environment Variable: UNEX_SESSION_COOKIE
